title: quercus robur subsp. estremadurensis
intro: Quercus robur subsp. estremadurensis is a subspecies of the English oak tree, native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Quercus robur subsp. estremadurensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is used to treat conditions such as arthritis, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
